site.name: Peaceful Nights Guide
site.tagline: Gentle sleep guides for tired parents.

hero.headline: Peaceful nights are possible.
hero.subheadline: Gentle, practical PDF guides that help your baby or toddler sleep — without tears, without guesswork.

about.title: About me
about.headline: I built this for the parents I used to be.
about.body: After months of broken sleep with my first child, I learned that small, consistent routines made the biggest difference. Peaceful Nights Guide is where I share what actually worked — written in plain language, tested in real homes, and designed for parents who are too tired to read a textbook. Every guide is a PDF you can download tonight and start using before bedtime.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.quote: We followed the 7-day plan and by night four my son was sleeping through. I cried — the good kind.

testimonials.name: James & Priya
testimonials.quote: Calm, clear, no judgment. It felt like a friend walking us through it. Worth every cent.

testimonials.name: Amelia R.
testimonials.quote: The routines worked for both of mine, even though they have very different temperaments. Lifesaver.

faqs.question: What age is the guide for?
faqs.answer: The main guide covers newborn through age 3, with separate sections for each stage. You can start using it at any age.

faqs.question: Is this a 'cry it out' method?
faqs.answer: No. Every technique inside is gentle and responsive. The goal is calmer nights without forcing tears.

faqs.question: How do I receive the guide?
faqs.answer: After checkout on Gumroad, you'll get an instant PDF download. You can read it on your phone, tablet, or print it.

faqs.question: Do you offer refunds?
faqs.answer: Yes. If the guide doesn't help your family within 14 days, email me and I'll refund you. No hard feelings.

faqs.question: Will it work if my child has been sleeping badly for months?
faqs.answer: Yes. Many parents in our community started after months of broken sleep. The 7-day reset is specifically designed for that situation.

email.heading: Get free parenting tips
email.subheading: Short, useful emails on sleep and routines. One a week. Unsubscribe anytime.

seo.metaTitle: Peaceful Nights Guide — Gentle Sleep Guides for Babies & Toddlers
